summary: The implementation includes all core features: sender form, unique link generation with UUID, backend storage with persistence, recipient view with centered candles, 'Blow the candles!' prompt, microphone-based blow detection, birthday message display, and festive warm color theme with confetti animations. All requirements appear to be implemented based on the diff evidence.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication system with login/logout functionality
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly lists 'User authentication or login system' as a non-goal, but the implementation includes useInternetIdentity hook, InternetIdentityProvider, AuthClient integration, and authentication context throughout the application

hallucinated_features.description: List all greetings endpoint in backend
hallucinated_features.reason: Backend includes a listAllGreetings query function that was not requested in any requirement. The BuildRequest only requires creating and retrieving individual greetings
